description: Legal document in which a paternal cousin (al-shaykh al-mukram al-Kohen Pinḥas) of a man’s wife (bint al-Muṣinn) renounces his inheritance rights on one-fourth of a house belonging to her against ten dinars promised to him by her husband (Abu Naṣr al-ʿAṭṭār known as Ibn Khalaf Ḥawājib) in case she precedes him in death. Dated: Sunday, 5 Ṭevet 1554 = 30 November 1242 CE. Unsigned, but mentions Yosef as a witness. (Information from Goitein's index cards and Mediterranean Society, 4:279) EMS
description_he: שטר: בן-דוד פינחס הכהן מוותר על זכות ירושה ברבע בית של בת-דוד (בת אל-מוצין) תמורת 10 דינר שיקבל אם תמות לפניו. תאריך: 5 טבת 1554 = 30 נובמבר 1242.
